channel-type.label: Doorbell Button
channel-type.description: Triggered when doorbell button is pressed.

channel-type.label: Door Image
channel-type.description: Snapshot image taken when doorbell is pressed.

channel-type.label: WebRTC Proxy Path
channel-type.description: Relative proxy path used by MainUI widgets to communicate with the binding.

channel-type.label: SIP Registered
channel-type.description: ON when the device has successfully registered with the SIP server.

channel-type.label: SIP Call State
channel-type.description: Current SIP call state (IDLE, RINGING, ANSWERING, ACTIVE, TERMINATING, HUNGUP).
